channel.title: Essential Math for AI
channel.description: Recent content on Essential Math for AI

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Active Project

🚀 Dual Encoder for Semantic Search

Status: 🔵 Active - In Development

Description: A neural architecture designed for efficient semantic similarity comparison between queries and documents. This project implements a dual encoder model with in-batch negative sampling for information retrieval tasks.

Technologies: PyTorch, Transformers, FAISS, FastAPI

Features:

  • Query and document encoding into shared embedding space
  • Cosine similarity scoring for relevance ranking
  • Scalable vector search with FAISS indexing
  • REST API for deployment

Current Milestones:

item.title: About
item.description:
About This Site

Welcome to Essential Math for Artificial Intelligence!

This site is dedicated to explaining the fundamental mathematical concepts needed for understanding and building AI systems.

Topics Covered

  • Linear Algebra
  • Calculus
  • Probability & Statistics
  • Optimization
  • Neural Networks
